sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']

# Check what objects exist now
print("Objects on board:")
for n in nodes:
    if n['pixels'] > 5:  # Only significant objects
        b = n['boundary']
        r_min = min(p[0] for p in b)
        c_min = min(p[1] for p in b)
        r_max = max(p[0] for p in b)
        c_max = max(p[1] for p in b)
        print(f"  id={n['id']}, color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, bounds=({r_min},{c_min})-({r_max},{c_max})")

# Check if yellow target still exists
yellow_exists = any(n['color'] == 'Y' for n in nodes)
print(f"Yellow target exists: {yellow_exists}")

# Check result
print(f"Level completed: {last_action_result.get('level_completed', False)}")
print(f"Game over: {last_action_result.get('game_over', False)}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
